attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
 FNL.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
 FNL.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT,
 FNL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
 FNL.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
 FNL.BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,
 FNL.LINK_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
 FNL.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,
 FNL.DV_END_CUST_REASON_DESCR,
 FNL.DV_END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLT_PCT,
 FNL.LAST_UPDATED_DTM,
 FNL.EDW_CREATE_DTM,
 FNL.EDW_CREATE_USER,
 FNL.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
 FNL.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
 FNL.SALES_REP_NUM,
 FNL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
 FNL.EP_OTM_TERRITORY_ID_INT,
 FNL.PROCESS_TYPE,
 CASE WHEN FNL.FIN_ADJ_KEY = -999 THEN RANDOM(1000000,1001800)*-1  ELSE FNL.FIN_ADJ_KEY END FIN_ADJ_KEY,   /* Random FNL.FIN_ADJ_KEY, */
 REASON.BK_REASON_CD AS DV_RSTMT_REASON_CD,
 MAX_MT.SK_SEQUENCE_ID + ROW_NUMBER()OVER(order by BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY) as SK_SEQUENCE_ID,
FNL.DV_SALES_REP_RSTMT_REASN_CD,
FNL.DV_SAV_RSTMT_REASON_CD,
NULL AS DV_SALES_REP_RST_RULE_CD
 FROM
 (
  SELECT 
  WSARMF.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY AS BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY, 
  WSARMF.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE AS BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT, 
  WSARMF.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE AS BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,
  WSARMF.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY AS DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY, 
  WSARMF.NEW_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT AS BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,
  WSARMF.LINK_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY AS LINK_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
  WSARMF.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY AS SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,
  WSARMF.REASON_DESC_END_CUST AS DV_END_CUST_REASON_DESCR,   
  WSARMF.SALES_CREDIT_SPLIT_PCT AS DV_END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLT_PCT,  
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) LAST_UPDATED_DTM ,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM , 
  USER EDW_CREATE_USER ,
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DTM, 
  USER EDW_UPDATE_USER ,/* added in DEC 11 - FY17 release */ 
  WSARMF.SALES_REP_NUM , 
  WSARMF.SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SALES_TERR_KEY  AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
  WSARMF.EP_OTM_TERRITORY_ID_INT AS EP_OTM_TERRITORY_ID_INT,
  WSARMF.PROCESS_TYPE,
  WSARMF.FIN_ADJ_KEY,
 WSARMF.REASON_DESCR   AS REASON_DESCR,
WSARMF.DV_SALES_REP_RSTMT_REASN_CD,
WSARMF.NODE_ENRICH_REASON,
WSARMF.DV_SAV_RSTMT_REASON_CD
  FROM $$STGDB.$$WI_DRR_SALES_ACNT_MEASURE_FNL1 WSARMF
  LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM $$ETL_DRR.$$EL_ACT_INACT_NODE_MAP_DRR WHERE VALID_FLAG = 'Y' ) EL
   ON EL.OLD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = WSARMF.SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SALES_TERR_KEY
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE NBM
   ON WSARMF.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
     AND WSARMF.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
     AND WSARMF.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
  ) FNL 
 INNER JOIN
 ( SELECT * FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DYN_RESTMT_ENRICH_REASON ) REASON
 ON FNL.NODE_ENRICH_REASON = REASON.REASON_DESCR,
 (SELECT MAX(SK_SEQUENCE_ID) AS SK_SEQUENCE_ID FROM
 (
 SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SK_SEQUENCE_ID), 0) AS SK_SEQUENCE_ID FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.$$MT_SLS_ACNT_RSTD_MSR_DRR_NG
 UNION ALL 
 SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SK_SEQUENCE_ID), 0) AS SK_SEQUENCE_ID FROM  $$DRRNG_DEL.$$MT_SLS_ACNT_RSTD_MSR_DRRNG_DEL
 ) SEQUENCE 
 ) MAX_MT

SELECT 
WI_FNL_DEL.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
WI_FNL_DEL.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
WI_FNL_DEL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
WI_FNL_DEL.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
WI_FNL_DEL.NEW_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,
WI_FNL_DEL.LINK_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
WI_FNL_DEL.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,
WI_FNL_DEL.REASON_DESC_END_CUST,
WI_FNL_DEL.REASON_DESCR,
WI_FNL_DEL.SALES_CREDIT_SPLIT_PCT,
WI_FNL_DEL.SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SALES_TERR_KEY,
WI_FNL_DEL.SALES_REP_NUM,
WI_FNL_DEL.EP_OTM_TERRITORY_ID_INT
FROM 
	(
	SELECT 
	WI_FNL.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
	WI_FNL.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
	WI_FNL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
	WI_FNL.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
	WI_FNL.NEW_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,
	WI_FNL.LINK_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,
	WI_FNL.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,
	WI_FNL.REASON_DESC_END_CUST,
	WI_FNL.REASON_DESCR,
	WI_FNL.SALES_CREDIT_SPLIT_PCT,
	WI_FNL.SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SALES_TERR_KEY,
	WI_FNL.SALES_REP_NUM,
	WI_FNL.EP_OTM_TERRITORY_ID_INT,
	NODE_REASON.BK_REASON_CD,
	DV_SALES_REP_RSTMT_REASN_CD,
	NODE_ENRICH_REASON,
	SAV_REASON.BK_REASON_CD AS DV_SAV_RSTMT_REASON_CD
	FROM 
		( SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.$$WI_DRR_SALES_ACCOUNT_MEASURE ) WI_FNL   
		INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DYN_RESTMT_ENRICH_REASON ) NODE_REASON
		ON WI_FNL.NODE_ENRICH_REASON = NODE_REASON.REASON_DESCR
		INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DYN_RESTMT_ENRICH_REASON ) SAV_REASON
		ON WI_FNL.REASON_DESCR = SAV_REASON.REASON_DESCR
	)WI_FNL_DEL	 
  WHERE EXISTS 
	( SELECT 1
        FROM (SELECT * FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.$$MT_SLS_ACNT_RSTD_MSR_DRR_NG WHERE PROCESS_TYPE = 'Engine') MT
        WHERE WI_FNL_DEL.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = MT.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
        AND WI_FNL_DEL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = MT.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD
        AND WI_FNL_DEL.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = MT.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT
        AND WI_FNL_DEL.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY = MT.DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY
        AND WI_FNL_DEL.NEW_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT = MT.BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT
        AND WI_FNL_DEL.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY = MT.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY
        AND WI_FNL_DEL.SALES_CREDIT_SPLIT_PCT = MT.DV_END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLT_PCT
        AND WI_FNL_DEL.SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SALES_TERR_KEY = MT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
        AND WI_FNL_DEL.SALES_REP_NUM = MT.SALES_REP_NUM
        AND WI_FNL_DEL.BK_REASON_CD = MT.DV_RSTMT_REASON_CD
		and WI_FNL_DEL.REASON_DESC_END_CUST = MT.DV_END_CUST_REASON_DESCR    
	and coalesce(WI_FNL_DEL.LINK_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,-999)   =coalesce(MT.LINK_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY,-999)
		and coalesce(WI_FNL_DEL.EP_OTM_TERRITORY_ID_INT  ,-999)  =coalesce(MT.EP_OTM_TERRITORY_ID_INT,-999)
AND WI_FNL_DEL.DV_SALES_REP_RSTMT_REASN_CD = MT.DV_SALES_REP_RSTMT_REASN_CD
AND WI_FNL_DEL.DV_SAV_RSTMT_REASON_CD=MT.DV_SAV_RSTMT_REASON_CD
	)

SELECT 
				FNL.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY ,           
				FNL.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE ,        
				FNL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE , 
				DV_END_CUST_PARTY_KEY ,
				NEW_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT  ,        
				LINK_CUSTOMER_PARTY_KEY ,       
				FNL.SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY ,
				REASON_DESC_END_CUST ,         
				FNL. REASON_DESCR ,
				FNL.SALES_CREDIT_SPLIT_PCT,  
				FNL.SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SALES_TERR_KEY, 
				FNL.SALES_REP_NUM ,
				EP_OTM_TERRITORY_ID_INT,
	DV_SALES_REP_RSTMT_REASN_CD,
	NODE_ENRICH_REASON,
    DV_SAV_RSTMT_REASON_CD
			FROM $$STGDB.$$WI_DRR_SALES_ACNT_MEASURE_FNL1 FNL
			INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_MEASURE NBM
				ON FNL.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = NBM.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
				AND FNL.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = NBM.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
				AND FNL.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = NBM.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
			LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM $$ETL_DRR.$$EL_ACT_INACT_NODE_MAP_DRR WHERE VALID_FLAG = 'Y' ) EL
				ON EL.OLD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = FNL.SLS_ACCT_GROUP_SALES_TERR_KEY
